processEnv = (env: BaseEnv): ENV => ({
  ...env,
  KEYS: env.APP_KEYS.split(',').map((key) => Buffer.from(key, 'base64')),
  EXP_MS_ACCESS: parseTime(env.EXP_ACCESS),
  EXP_MS_REFRESH: parseTime(env.EXP_REFRESH),
  EXP_MS_VERIFY_EMAIL: parseTime(env.EXP_VERIFY_EMAIL),
  EXP_MS_RESET_PASSWORD: parseTime(env.EXP_RESET_PASSWORD)
})

function getEmptyHookRoute () {
  return {
    onRequest: [],
    preParsing: [],
    preValidation: [],
    preHandler: [],
    preSerialization: [], //
    onError: [], //
    onSend: [],
    onResponse: [],
    onTimeout: [], //
    onRequestAbort: []
  }
}

setHeaders: (res, path, stat) => {
  expect(res.filename).type.toBe<string>()
  expect(res.statusCode).type.toBe<number>()
  expect(res.getHeader('X-Test')).type.toBe<ReturnType<FastifyReply['getHeader']>>()
  res.setHeader('X-Test', 'string')

  expect(path).type.toBe<string>()

  expect(stat).type.toBe<Stats>()
}
